synthesis.driver: US-Iran strikes over Hormuz push Brent up $2.89, but oversupply caps larger spikes.
synthesis.based_on: China Merchants Energy lines up 10-ship order

takes.manus on markets renewed us iran strikes: Renewed strikes escalate Hormuz tensions, lifting Brent despite oversupply pressure.
takes.oil prices leap and stocks fall amid us: US-Iran escalation drives oil higher, overriding soft demand and supply glut.
takes.u s and iran exchange strikes as strait: Strait standoff escalation adds war premium, pushing Brent up despite structural oversupply.
takes.sfakianakis iran tests us resolve in hor: Iran tests US resolve, signaling risk escalation and supporting higher oil prices.
